The '''Lijarak Mines Incident''' occurred on the celestial body [[Anic]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[operative]] [[Larq Thur]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the incident.<ref name="AIR" />
{{Battle-stub}}
